## `avg_over_time` [promql-fn-avg_over_time]

{applies_to}`stack: preview 9.4.0` {applies_to}`serverless: preview`

Returns the average value of all points in the specified time range.

Returns `instant_vector`.

### Parameters

`v` (`range_vector`)
:   Range vector input.

### Example

```
avg_over_time(http_requests_total[5m])
```
